headline.purpose: Uppercase section titles with poster pressure.

body.purpose: Readable Spanish editorial and form copy.

label.purpose: Compact metadata, dates, and UI labels.

shadows.name: release-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover depth paired with image movement.

motion.name: state-out
motion.purpose: Navigation hide/show and small state changes.

motion.name: cinematic-out
motion.purpose: Hero and release-card entrances or hover movement.

motion.name: scroll-scrub
motion.purpose: Scroll-bound cinematic motion controlled by the reader.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact orange-red action for listening, saving dates, contact submission, and catalog links.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: #f55033; color: #ffffff; font-family: Barlow, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(245,80,51,0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,80,51,0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary navigation or external-shop action with primary text and a faint primary border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(245,80,51,0.3); border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #f55033; font-family: Barlow, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,80,51,0.5); }

components.name: Dark Input
components.description: Contact-form field on a dark surface.
components.css: .ds-input-dark { width: 100%; height: 36px; min-width: 0; border: 1px solid #1a1a1a; border-radius: 8px; background: #111111; color: #ffffff; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: Barlow, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; transition: border-color 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-input-dark::placeholder { color: #f0f0f0; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-input-dark:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #f55033; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,80,51,0.5); }

components.name: Fixed Navigation
components.description: Dark blurred top bar with primary wordmark and compact route actions.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 16px; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); color: #f55033; font-family: Barlow, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; } .ds-nav-link { padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,80,51,0.5); }

components.name: Release Card
components.description: Image-led music object with dark gradient, uppercase title, and primary play signal.
components.css: .ds-release-card { position: relative; isolation: isolate; overflow: hidden; min-height: 320px; border-radius: 14px; background: #0a0a0a; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.05); transition: box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-release-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-release-image { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a1a, #0a0a0a); transform: scale(1.02); transition: transform 600ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-release-card:hover .ds-release-image { transform: scale(1.08) translate(2%, -2%); } .ds-release-gradient { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.6), rgba(0,0,0,0.2), rgba(0,0,0,0)); } .ds-release-content { position: absolute; inset: auto 0 0 0; padding: 24px; } .ds-release-content h3 { margin: 0 0 12px; font-family: Barlow Condensed, sans-serif; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1.05; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-play-dot { display: inline-grid; place-items: center; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(245,80,51,0.2); color: #f55033; }

narrative.overview:
Hotel Sur's interface is a dark, textural music site built around pressure, loss, and physical sound. It should feel like a cinematic poster system that became interactive: full-bleed artwork, uppercase condensed type, orange-red marks, grain, slow scroll pressure, and abrupt light interruptions when the narrative needs air.

The system rejects interchangeable band templates, SaaS polish, lifestyle cleanliness, and decorative animation. Dark is the default world. White sections are narrative ruptures, not layout variety. Every screen should feel authored for this band and this album cycle.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, image-led, and atmospheric by default.
Orange-red is the signal color for titles, CTAs, focus, and live energy.
Condensed uppercase headings carry the brutalist poster voice.
Motion is cinematic pressure, never decoration.
Light surfaces are rare interruptions with a reason.

rules.name: The Dark World Rule
rules.body: Start from `neutral-900`. Use light sections only as a narrative rupture.

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: `primary` must stay rare enough to feel charged. If everything is red, nothing is urgent.

rules.name: The No Generic Palette Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce indie beige, Spotify green, SaaS blue, purple gradients, or lifestyle pastels.

rules.name: The Poster Voice Rule
rules.body: Headings are uppercase, condensed, and blunt. Do not turn Hotel Sur headings into polite title case.

rules.name: The Readable Brutalism Rule
rules.body: Brutal does not mean illegible. Body text must remain comfortable, especially on black.

rules.name: The Flat Stage Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth comes from image layers and tonal pressure before shadows.

dos: Do start brand surfaces from `neutral-900` and build pressure with image layers, grain, and typography.
Do use `primary` for titles, CTAs, rings, play signals, and orbital marks.
Do keep headings uppercase, condensed, and forceful.
Do make every animation emotionally purposeful and respect reduced motion.
Do preserve strong contrast and visible focus states for WCAG 2.1 AA.
Do use white sections as a flash, memory, cut, rupture, or breathing space after density.
donts: Don't make this look like a generic indie band template or clean Webflow-style site.
Don't use startup/SaaS aesthetics or overly polished lifestyle branding.
Don't build a "Hero + listen now + tour dates" layout that could belong to any band.
Don't rely on Spotify-card grids as the primary visual language.
Don't add scroll animations with no emotional purpose.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or nested cards.
Don't alternate dark and light sections just for variety.
